channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Lagos Upgrades and Reopens Tolu Schools Complex to Boost Access to Modern Education
item.description: The Lagos State Government don commission the newly upgraded Tolu Schools Complex for Ajegunle side, Ajeromi-Ifelodun Local Government Area. Dis project dey stand as one major step to improve public e...

item.title: Fatal Crash Near Brooks Claims Woman's Life, Child Hospitalized
item.description: A single-vehicle crash near Brooks, Alberta, has resulted in the death of a 35-year-old woman from Pincher Creek and serious injuries to a child. The incident occurred around 2:10 p.m. on Wednesday, A...

item.title: Timeline of the Gilgo Beach Murders and the Investigation Leading to Rex Heuermann's Confession
item.description: The Gilgo Beach murders, spanning over two decades, left a community in fear and baffled investigators. Starting with the 2010 disappearance of Shannan Gilbert, the case eventually led to the discover...

item.title: Nato Secretary General Mark Rutte affirms allies are supporting US requests in Iran conflict following Trump meeting
item.description: Nato Secretary General Mark Rutte has stated that alliance members are now providing substantial logistical and other support to the United States in the ongoing Iran conflict, addressing President Do...

item.title: 10 Funny and Memorable OOTD Moments on 'It's Showtime'

item.title: EACC Pushes for System-Based Reforms to Curb Corruption in Kenya
item.description: David Oginde, the Chairperson of Kenya’s Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission (EACC), has emphasized the importance of shifting from reactive to preventive anti-corruption strategies during the launc...

item.title: Transcorp Hilton Denies Cancelling ADC National Convention Booking
item.description: Transcorp Hilton Abuja has responded to claims circulating on social media that the hotel cancelled a booking for the African Democratic Congress (ADC) National Convention, scheduled for April 14, 202...

item.title: Nominations Open for Agricultural Produce Agents Council in South Africa
item.description: The South African Department of Agriculture is actively seeking nominations for members of the Agricultural Produce Agents Council (APAC), as announced by Agriculture Minister John Steenhuisen. These ...

item.title: Sister of film director allegedly murdered by woman stole valuable watch, court hears
item.description: A woman accused of murdering her film director sister has allegedly stolen a diamond-encrusted Rolex watch, according to court testimony. The prosecution claims the accused, named in court only as 'X'...

item.title: The hidden health impact of women prioritising others over themselves
item.description: The article, written by Lowri Dowthwaite-Walsh and published on The Conversation, explores the psychological and physical consequences that many women face after years of neglecting their own needs in...

item.title: Weekly South Africanised Cryptic Crossword JDE 525
item.description: The Mail & Guardian presents its weekly South Africanised cryptic crossword, compiled by George Euvrard. This crossword, JDE 525, is designed to cater to a local audience while maintaining world-class...

item.title: Palestine diplomat urges Tanzania to boost humanitarian advocacy amid Gaza conflict
item.description: The Ambassador-Designate of the State of Palestine to Tanzania, Mr Salam Abu Sharar, has appealed to Tanzania and its citizens to intensify humanitarian advocacy in light of the deepening crisis in Ga...

item.title: Senior NPA leader and female aide killed in T’boli, South Cotabato firefight
item.description: Authorities reported the killing of Anthony Narvasa, alleged secretary of the New People's Army's Far South Mindanao Region, and his female companion, Rosa Kian, during a firefight in Barangay Laconon...

item.title: Canadian Dollar Strengthens Amid Middle East Ceasefire and Upcoming Jobs Data
item.description: The Canadian dollar rose to a two-week high against the U.S. dollar on Wednesday, reaching 1.3815 CAD per USD, as optimism about a tentative ceasefire in the Middle East supported investor sentiment. ...

item.title: Authorities detain 17 fishermen for unauthorized entry into Tubbataha Reef protected zone
item.description: Seventeen fishermen were apprehended by authorities after they allegedly entered the protected waters of the Tubbataha Reefs Natural Park, which is a UNESCO World Heritage Site located in the Sulu Sea...

item.title: Anthropic Releases Claude Mythos Preview: Advanced AI Poses Cybersecurity Challenges
item.description: On April 7, 2026, Anthropic unveiled the Claude Mythos Preview, a highly advanced large language model, to a select consortium of around 40 tech giants including Google, Apple, Amazon, Microsoft, and ...

item.title: EPRA Issues Warning to Oil Companies Over Fuel Hoarding and Price Violations
item.description: Nairobi — The Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA) has issued a stern warning to oil marketing companies (OMCs) in Kenya over cases of fuel hoarding and overpricing. According to EPRA Acti...

item.title: CBK Keeps Key Rate Unchanged to Manage Inflation Amid Global Tensions
item.description: The Central Bank of Kenya (CBK) has decided to maintain its benchmark Central Bank Rate (CBR) at 8.75 percent, citing heightened global risks resulting from the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Th...

item.title: Gen Z in South Africa shifts towards more selective and moderate drinking habits
